name: multi-environment-setup
scenario: Set up a project with dev, staging, and prod environments. Each environment needs different DATABASE_URL and API_KEY values. Use groups to organize them in a single config file. Then demonstrate how to list variables for each environment and export the prod environment to a .env file.
success_criteria: Uses setg command with group names (dev, staging, prod)
Sets DATABASE_URL and API_KEY for each environment
Uses listg to verify each environment's variables
anti_patterns: Using separate config files instead of groups
